description: Fix photo frame opacity on cinema/gallery/studio/memory themes, fix prayer highlight on fullphoto13/15/16/17/19, and fix adzan overlay text clipping when imam is active
steps: 1. In index.html line ~499 (cinema template), the slideshow section has style='background:rgba(15,23,42,0.85);' - remove this hardcoded dark background. The slideshow-host div inside it already has the slideshow images that use --slide-opacity.

2. In index.html line ~1308 (gallery template), the photo frame div has style='...background:rgba(15,23,42,0.6);border:6px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.15);' - remove the rgba(15,23,42,0.6) background but keep the border. The slideshow-host inside already respects --slide-opacity.

3. In index.html line ~1373 (studio template), the photo frame div has style='...background:rgba(10,10,10,0.6);box-shadow:...' - remove the rgba(10,10,10,0.6) from background but keep box-shadow and border styling.
4. In index.html line ~1404 (memory template), find the photo frame container with dark background and remove the dark rgba background.

5. In screen.css, add proper .prayer.next styling for fullphoto13, fullphoto15, fullphoto16, fullphoto17, fullphoto19 with glow/scale effects instead of the default ugly yellow bar. Use: transform:scale(1.08), box-shadow with accent glow, background gradient with accent color, and hide the ::before bar. Each theme should have slightly different treatment matching its design aesthetic.

6. Fix the adzan overlay (#adzanOverlay in index.html) text clipping: The inner content div uses fixed large font sizes (text-5xl, text-4xl, 8rem) that overflow vertically when imam info is shown. Fix by: (a) change the inner container from having no overflow control to having overflow-y:auto and max-height:100vh with proper padding, (b) reduce the fixed font sizes to use clamp() or vh-based units that scale down, (c) ensure the entire overlay content fits within viewport even with imam + khatib + quran card showing. Specifically change the container div inside #adzanOverlay from 'relative text-center text-white' to include max-h-[100vh] overflow-y-auto py-6 and reduce ovPrayer from text-5xl to text-[clamp(1.5rem,5vh,3rem)], ovMsg from text-5xl to text-[clamp(1.2rem,4vh,2.5rem)], ovCount from font-size:8rem to font-size:clamp(3rem,12vh,8rem), ovSub from text-3xl to text-[clamp(1rem,3vh,1.8rem)], and imam name/label elements to use responsive sizes.
acceptance_criteria: cinema template slideshow section no longer has hardcoded background:rgba(15,23,42,0.85)
gallery/studio/memory photo frame containers no longer have hardcoded dark rgba backgrounds

screen.css has .layout-fullphoto13 .prayer.next, .layout-fullphoto15 .prayer.next, .layout-fullphoto16 .prayer.next, .layout-fullphoto17 .prayer.next, .layout-fullphoto19 .prayer.next rules with glow/scale effects and ::before { display: none }
Adzan overlay inner content uses responsive font sizing with clamp() that prevents text from being cut off when imam schedule is displayed
verification: Run ./gradlew assembleDebug and confirm build success
grep for 'rgba(15,23,42,0.85)' in the cinema section and confirm it is gone
grep for '.layout-fullphoto13 .prayer.next' in screen.css and confirm it exists with glow styling
findings: Build requires JAVA_HOME=/opt/toolchains/.local/share/mise/installs/java/17.0.2 and ANDROID_HOME=/opt/android-sdk. All 3 parts implemented successfully: photo frame opacity fix on 4 themes, prayer highlight CSS for 5 fullphoto themes, and adzan overlay responsive text sizing.
